description: Conceptual map illustrating a "New established feature with splitted change" between 2012 and 2018 for Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) products. The image shows several land parcels and a road. Polygon 1, coloured light orange, represents an industrial area (CORINE Land Cover code 1.1.2) that was initially below the Minimum Mapping Unit (MMU) in 2012 and therefore not mapped. Polygon 2, coloured light beige, represents a neighbouring urban area (CORINE Land Cover code 1.1.1) in 2012. A grey polygon at the bottom represents a road, and light green areas are other surrounding land cover types. In the 2018 update, part of the urban area (Polygon 2) changes into an industrial area. The purple line, marked with red and green squares as vertices, delineates the new boundary of the industrial area. This new industrial feature comprises the original Polygon 1 and the newly changed portion of Polygon 2. The combined area of this newly formed industrial feature now exceeds the MMU, making it a mappable feature in the 2018 land cover product.
